src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Migrate the Generated annotation import from javax.annotation to jakarta.annotation to align with Jakarta EE namespace changes.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The javax.annotation package is removed or deprecated in newer Jakarta EE versions; using it causes compilation errors or classpath conflicts when the project targets Jakarta EE 9+ artifacts.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace javax.annotation with jakarta.annotation to align with Jakarta EE namespace changes in Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: javax.annotation package is removed in Java 9+ and not present in Spring Boot 3 dependencies; code fails to compile with 'package javax.annotation does not exist'.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace the Hibernate 5 Jackson module with its Jakarta EE namespace variant to support the migration from javax to jakarta packages.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The original Hibernate5Module relies on javax.persistence classes which are removed or relocated in Jakarta EE environments; using the non-Jakarta module causes ClassNotFoundException or NoClassDefFoundError at runtime on JDK 17 with Jakarta dependencies.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace deprecated setLabels method with setLabelFilter to align with updated Spring Boot LiquibaseProperties API.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The method setLabels(String) was removed or deprecated in favor of setLabelFilter(String) in newer Spring Boot versions; calling the old method causes a compile error.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace deprecated WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter with SecurityFilterChain bean to comply with Spring Security 5.7+ API changes.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter is deprecated in Spring Security 5.7 and removed in Spring Security 6.0; extending it causes compilation errors or severe deprecation warnings on modern Spring Boot versions.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace deprecated @EnableGlobalMethodSecurity with @EnableMethodSecurity to align with Spring Security 6.0 method security configuration.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: @EnableGlobalMethodSecurity is removed in Spring Security 6.0; using it results in a compilation error.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Migrate request authorization from authorizeRequests().antMatchers() to authorizeHttpRequests().requestMatchers() to use the new matcher API.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: authorizeRequests() and antMatchers() are removed in Spring Security 6.0; using them causes compilation errors.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Migrate header configuration from fluent DSL to lambda-based configuration to comply with Spring Security 6.0 API.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The old fluent header configuration methods (e.g., .contentSecurityPolicy(String)) are removed in Spring Security 6.0; using them causes compilation errors.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace custom JWT configuration with standard OAuth2 Resource Server JWT configuration.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The custom JWTConfigurer approach is incompatible with the new SecurityFilterChain model and Spring Security 6.0's preferred OAuth2 resource server integration.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace custom SecurityProblemSupport exception handling with standard BearerTokenAuthenticationEntryPoint and BearerTokenAccessDeniedHandler.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The old exception handling configuration is incompatible with the new SecurityFilterChain model and OAuth2 resource server setup.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Remove WebSecurity configuration for ignoring static resources as it is no longer needed or supported in the same way.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The configure(WebSecurity web) method is not used in the new SecurityFilterChain bean model; static resources are handled via permitAll in authorizeHttpRequests.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update CSRF configuration to use the new lambda-based API and ignore specific request matchers.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The old CSRF configuration API is removed in Spring Security 6.0; using it causes compilation errors.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace CorsFilter injection with SpaWebFilter for handling SPA routing and CORS.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The old CorsFilter injection is incompatible with the new SecurityFilterChain model and the application's new SPA handling strategy.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update session management configuration to use the new lambda-based API.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The old session management API is removed in Spring Security 6.0; using it causes compilation errors.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Add new imports required for the updated security configuration.
Update constructor to inject JHipsterProperties instead of TokenProvider, CorsFilter, and SecurityProblemSupport.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The old dependencies are no longer used in the new security configuration; injecting them causes compilation errors or unused dependency warnings.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.before: public SecurityConfiguration(TokenProvider tokenProvider, CorsFilter corsFilter, SecurityProblemSupport problemSupport)

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Add new fields required for the updated security configuration.
Add @Configuration annotation to the security configuration class.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The @Configuration annotation is required for the class to be recognized as a Spring configuration class.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace javax.servlet imports with jakarta.servlet to align with Spring Boot 3.x and Jakarta EE 9+ namespace changes.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: javax.servlet classes are removed in Jakarta EE 9+/Spring Boot 3, causing compilation errors due to missing packages.
